summary.master_summary: Mr. Kumar, a 58-year-old male with blood group B+, was admitted to Smile Care Hospital on May 20, 2026, under the care of Dr. Priya Sharma in the General Medicine department for appendicitis. He was discharged on May 27, 2026, in stable condition. The patient underwent a successful appendectomy and is recovering well.
summary.reason_for_admission: The patient was admitted to the hospital due to appendicitis.
summary.prescription: The patient has been prescribed antibiotics and pain management medication.
summary.instructions: The patient is instructed to continue with prescribed medications, maintain a healthy diet, and get adequate rest. He should monitor for any signs of infection or complications and report them immediately. Regular wound care is also advised.
summary.condition_at_discharge: The patient is discharged in stable condition, with no acute complaints.
summary.follow_up: A follow-up appointment with Dr. Priya Sharma is scheduled in two weeks to assess recovery and remove sutures.
